subcodes.title: Cablegram dated 1914-01-22
subcodes.first_line_orig: Verily in this most great calamity the eyes wept tears and the hearts burned. Perfect resignation is incumbent upon you in this supreme hour of stupendous trial.
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
